name: mcc
description: MCC · Multi-target Claude/Codex Configuration — 19 agents + 13 commands + 18 skills + 3 behavioral modes + 25 hook scripts + 5 MCP servers + curated rules（Python ↔ TypeScript 完整对等）。v2.4 smart-split：用户级能力强制装 ~/.claude/（agents/commands/skills/settings/MCP）+ 项目工作产物落 cwd/.claude/PRPs/。装时预写完整 Tool(*) allow 清单 + .claude/.codex path-glob 规则，杀掉所有 .claude/ 弹窗。
